title: Jungle Jim in the Forbidden Land

sources.title: JUNGLE JIM IN THE FORBIDDEN LAND 1952 colorized
sources.description: Jungle Jim battles evil ivory poachers, mutant giants, stock footage, and cheap sets with the help of a pretty anthropologist and his cute chimp Tamba.

metadata.Plot: Jungle Jim battles evil ivory poachers, mutant giants, stock footage, and cheap sets with the help of a pretty anthropologist and his cute chimp Tamba.
metadata.Actors: Johnny Weissmuller, Angela Greene, Jean Willes
